candidate_rule: When the starting pitcher on the 'safe' side of an under has a documented ERA above 8.00 in multiple prior starts against the opposing lineup, treat that as a disqualifying factor for the under regardless of park factors — but validate against a larger sample before hardcoding.
sample_size_warning: N=1, insufficient to establish rule. One loss where Kirby's Padres-specific splits were the deciding factor is noise; need N≥5 similar setups to confirm the pattern.
